title: Irish Inspired Irish Potatoes Skillet
description: A hearty and cozy Irish dish featuring nutty and juicy potatoes, cooked to perfection in a cast-iron skillet. This recipe is a raw-friendly and stir-fry inspired twist on traditional Irish cuisine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onions and cook until they are translucent and starting to brown.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the diced potatoes, carrots, and bell peppers to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook the vegetables for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they are tender and lightly browned.
Season the vegetables with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the Irish potatoes skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
